user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter employee time off requests by period, status, department and employee class, so that I can quickly find the requests I need to review
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When I set period, status, department or employee class and click Search; Then only matching time off requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter requests by status such as Pending with me, Pending approval, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled, Taken and Tentative, so that I can act on requests in a specific state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When I select a status like Pending with me; Then only requests in that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign time off to an employee, so that I can record leave on their behalf
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When I click Assign time off and provide the required details; Then the time off is created for the selected employee

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view request details including time off type, from and to dates, number of time offs, applied date and reason, so that I can make an informed approval decision
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows time off type, time off from, time off to, number of time offs, applied date, reason and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle between active and inactive employees, so that I can control which employees' requests appear
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list reflects the chosen employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my search criteria and start over
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Time Off Requests screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
